---
title: 'Hello.... Welcome'
date: '2016-05-25T06:52:00.0010000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '1943593022345661413'
blogger_filename: '/2016/05/hello-welcome.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'News & Updates'
  - 'Fiction'
  - 'NonFiction'
  - 'Other'
---

I'm setting up this site to be a single HUB for all of my various creations. I'd rather not hand out a different business card to each person, as the topic of interest changes and I happen to have written about it.<br />
<br />
Since I'm a Multipontialite, I figured it fits to have a single hub. If it works for <a href="http://www.sethgodin.com/sg/" target="_blank">Seth Godin</a>, it works for me!<br />
<br />
Thanks for stopping by, Darrell
